name: sangfor-sip
description: OctoBus package for Sangfor SIP (Security Intelligence Platform): pull security events, risk assets/terminals, server/terminal inventory, IP groups, and vulnerability data (weak passwords, CVEs, plaintext transmission).

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetSecurityEvent.name: get-security-events
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetSecurityEvent.description: Pull security events from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetRiskBusiness.name: get-risk-business
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetRiskBusiness.description: Pull risk business assets from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetRiskTerminals.name: get-risk-terminals
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetRiskTerminals.description: Pull risk terminal assets from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetServers.name: get-servers
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetServers.description: Pull configured server asset records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetTerminals.name: get-terminals
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetTerminals.description: Pull terminal asset records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetIPGroups.name: get-ip-groups
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetIPGroups.description: Pull monitored IP group records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetWeakPasswords.name: get-weak-passwords
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetWeakPasswords.description: Pull weak password vulnerability records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetVulnerabiliti.name: get-vulnerabilities
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetVulnerabiliti.description: Pull vulnerability (CVE/hole) records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.

SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetPlaintextTran.name: get-plaintext-transmissions
SANGFOR_SIP.SANGFOR_SIP/GetPlaintextTran.description: Pull plaintext transmission vulnerability records from Sangfor SIP within a time range.
